overall.description: First-person perspective from a semi-truck cabin driving through a heavy snowstorm on a mountain highway. The driver overtakes multiple trucks while navigating through snowy conditions with active windshield wipers, transitioning from open mountain views to forested sections and elevated bridges.

windshield wipers working continuously as heavy snowfall reduces visibility

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving through heavy snowfall on a mountain highway. The driver is following a white semi-truck ahead while snow-covered mountains loom in the distance. The windshield wipers are active, and the driver begins signaling to overtake the truck ahead.

segments.scene_description: The driver completes overtaking the white truck as a blue semi-truck simultaneously passes on the right. The scene transitions onto an elevated bridge with prominent metal guardrails on both sides, while snow continues to fall heavily and visibility remains reduced.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the truck enters a densely forested mountain highway with snow-covered pine trees lining both sides. The driver approaches another semi-truck ahead while navigating the winding road through the heavy snowfall.

segments.scene_description: The driver overtakes the semi-truck ahead on the winding forest highway, passing it on the left as the truck moves to the right lane. The journey continues through the dense snow-covered forest with trees now closer to the roadside, maintaining steady progress through the persistent snowstorm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a heavy snowstorm, transitioning from open mountain vistas to a confined, forested highway. It begins with the driver following a white semi-truck against a backdrop of looming snow-covered mountains, with active windshield wipers clearing the persistent snowfall. As the driver signals and overtakes the white truck, the camera captures a blue semi-truck passing on the right just as the road shifts onto an elevated bridge flanked by metal guardrails. The scene then expands from the bridge into a densely forested stretch of highway where snow-laden pine trees crowd the roadside. Finally, the camera tracks the truck as it maneuvers through a winding path, overtaking another semi-truck before disappearing further into the thick, white woods.
